# kemp_sub_virtual_service (Data Source)

Reads a Sub-Virtual Service by its LoadMaster `Index`.

## Example Usage

```terraform
data "kemp_sub_virtual_service" "existing" {
  id = "42"
}

output "nickname" {
  value = data.kemp_sub_virtual_service.existing.nickname
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `id` (String) LoadMaster `Index` of the SubVS.

### Optional

- `parent_id` (String) `Index` of the parent virtual service.

### Read-Only

- `bandwidth` (Number)
- `cert_files` (List of String)
- `check_port` (String)
- `check_type` (String)
- `check_use_get` (String)
- `check_use_http11` (Boolean)
- `chk_interval` (Number)
- `chk_retry_count` (Number)
- `chk_timeout` (Number)
- `conns_per_sec_limit` (Number)
- `enabled` (Boolean)
- `enhanced_health_checks` (Boolean)
- `esp_allowed_directories` (String)
- `esp_allowed_hosts` (String)
- `esp_display_pub_priv` (Boolean)
- `esp_enabled` (Boolean)
- `esp_include_nested_groups` (Boolean)
- `esp_input_auth_mode` (String)
- `esp_logs` (Boolean)
- `esp_output_auth_mode` (String)
- `esp_sso_domain` (String)
- `esp_sso_out_domain` (String)
- `force_l7` (Boolean)
- `idletime` (Number)
- `match_len` (Number)
- `max_conns_limit` (Number)
- `need_host_name` (Boolean)
- `nickname` (String)
- `persist_timeout` (String)
- `requests_per_sec_limit` (Number)
- `schedule` (String)
- `ssl_acceleration` (Boolean)
- `type` (String)
- `waf_alert_threshold` (Number)
- `waf_blocking_paranoia` (Number)
- `waf_intercept_mode` (String)
